selection_basis.rationale: one-day GitHub windows chosen from read-only probes to keep all selected frozen slices below the 1000-result cap while preserving real live replay coverage
selection_basis.controlled_failure_strategy: use APO_GITHUB_LIVE_FAIL_ON_PAGE=1 for matrix breadth to validate retryable failure checkpoint/resume without exceeding GitHub core README hydration budget; retain existing Phase1-E page-2 partial-raw evidence as depth coverage

request_params.query_text: "ai workflow" in:name,description,readme,topics is:public fork:false archived:false mirror:false pushed:2025-03-05..2025-03-05
"ai workflow" in:name,description,readme,topics is:public fork:false archived:false mirror:false pushed:2025-03-05..2025-03-05
